출애굽기 28:1.content: “Bring Aaron your brother, and his sons with him, near to you from among the children of Israel, that he may minister to me in the priest’s office: Aaron, Nadab and Abihu, Eleazar and Ithamar, Aaron’s sons.

출애굽기 28:2.content: You shall make holy garments for Aaron your brother, for glory and for beauty.

출애굽기 28:3.content: You shall speak to all who are wise-hearted, whom I have filled with the spirit of wisdom, that they make Aaron’s garments to sanctify him, that he may minister to me in the priest’s office.

출애굽기 28:4.content: These are the garments which they shall make: a breastplate, an ephod, a robe, a fitted tunic, a turban, and a sash. They shall make holy garments for Aaron your brother and his sons, that he may minister to me in the priest’s office.

출애굽기 28:5.content: They shall use the gold, and the blue, and the purple, and the scarlet, and the fine linen.

출애굽기 28:6.content: “They shall make the ephod of gold, blue, purple, scarlet, and fine twined linen, the work of the skillful workman.

출애굽기 28:7.content: It shall have two shoulder straps joined to the two ends of it, that it may be joined together.

출애굽기 28:8.content: The skillfully woven band, which is on it, shall be like its work and of the same piece; of gold, blue, purple, scarlet, and fine twined linen.

출애굽기 28:9.content: You shall take two onyx stones, and engrave on them the names of the children of Israel.

출애굽기 28:10.content: Six of their names on the one stone, and the names of the six that remain on the other stone, in the order of their birth.

출애굽기 28:11.content: With the work of an engraver in stone, like the engravings of a signet, you shall engrave the two stones, according to the names of the children of Israel. You shall make them to be enclosed in settings of gold.

출애굽기 28:12.content: You shall put the two stones on the shoulder straps of the ephod, to be stones of memorial for the children of Israel. Aaron shall bear their names before Yahweh on his two shoulders for a memorial.

출애굽기 28:13.content: You shall make settings of gold,

출애굽기 28:14.content: and two chains of pure gold; you shall make them like cords of braided work. You shall put the braided chains on the settings.

출애굽기 28:15.content: “You shall make a breastplate of judgment, the work of the skillful workman; like the work of the ephod you shall make it; of gold, of blue, and purple, and scarlet, and fine twined linen, you shall make it.

출애굽기 28:16.content: It shall be square and folded double; a span shall be its length, and a span its width.

출애굽기 28:17.content: You shall set in it settings of stones, four rows of stones: a row of ruby, topaz, and beryl shall be the first row;

출애굽기 28:18.content: and the second row a turquoise, a sapphire, and an emerald;

출애굽기 28:19.content: and the third row a jacinth, an agate, and an amethyst;

출애굽기 28:20.content: and the fourth row a chrysolite, an onyx, and a jasper. They shall be enclosed in gold in their settings.

출애굽기 28:21.content: The stones shall be according to the names of the children of Israel, twelve, according to their names; like the engravings of a signet, everyone according to his name, they shall be for the twelve tribes.

출애굽기 28:22.content: You shall make on the breastplate chains like cords, of braided work of pure gold.

출애굽기 28:23.content: You shall make on the breastplate two rings of gold, and shall put the two rings on the two ends of the breastplate.

출애굽기 28:24.content: You shall put the two braided chains of gold in the two rings at the ends of the breastplate.

출애굽기 28:25.content: The other two ends of the two braided chains you shall put on the two settings, and put them on the shoulder straps of the ephod in its forepart.

출애굽기 28:26.content: You shall make two rings of gold, and you shall put them on the two ends of the breastplate, on its edge, which is toward the side of the ephod inward.

출애굽기 28:27.content: You shall make two rings of gold, and shall put them on the two shoulder straps of the ephod underneath, in its forepart, close by its coupling, above the skillfully woven band of the ephod.

출애굽기 28:28.content: They shall bind the breastplate by its rings to the rings of the ephod with a lace of blue, that it may be on the skillfully woven band of the ephod, and that the breastplate may not swing out from the ephod.

출애굽기 28:29.content: Aaron shall bear the names of the children of Israel in the breastplate of judgment on his heart, when he goes in to the holy place, for a memorial before Yahweh continually.

출애굽기 28:30.content: You shall put in the breastplate of judgment the Urim and the Thummim; and they shall be on Aaron’s heart, when he goes in before Yahweh. Aaron shall bear the judgment of the children of Israel on his heart before Yahweh continually.

출애굽기 28:31.content: “You shall make the robe of the ephod all of blue.

출애굽기 28:32.content: It shall have a hole for the head in the middle of it. It shall have a binding of woven work around its hole, as it were the hole of a coat of mail, that it not be torn.

출애굽기 28:33.content: On its hem you shall make pomegranates of blue, and of purple, and of scarlet, all around its hem; with bells of gold between and around them:

출애굽기 28:34.content: a golden bell and a pomegranate, a golden bell and a pomegranate, around the hem of the robe.

출애굽기 28:35.content: It shall be on Aaron to minister: and its sound shall be heard when he goes in to the holy place before Yahweh, and when he comes out, that he not die.

출애굽기 28:36.content: “You shall make a plate of pure gold, and engrave on it, like the engravings of a signet, ‘HOLY TO YAHWEH.’

출애굽기 28:37.content: You shall put it on a lace of blue, and it shall be on the sash. It shall be on the front of the sash.

출애굽기 28:38.content: It shall be on Aaron’s forehead, and Aaron shall bear the iniquity of the holy things, which the children of Israel shall make holy in all their holy gifts; and it shall be always on his forehead, that they may be accepted before Yahweh.

출애굽기 28:39.content: You shall weave the tunic with fine linen. You shall make a turban of fine linen. You shall make a sash, the work of the embroiderer.

출애굽기 28:40.content: “You shall make tunics for Aaron’s sons. You shall make sashes for them. You shall make headbands for them, for glory and for beauty.

출애굽기 28:41.content: You shall put them on Aaron your brother, and on his sons with him, and shall anoint them, and consecrate them, and sanctify them, that they may minister to me in the priest’s office.

출애굽기 28:42.content: You shall make them linen pants to cover their naked flesh. They shall reach from the waist even to the thighs.

출애굽기 28:43.content: They shall be on Aaron and on his sons, when they go in to the Tent of Meeting, or when they come near to the altar to minister in the holy place, that they don’t bear iniquity, and die. This shall be a statute forever to him and to his offspring after him.
